title: Enchanted Golden Apple Advancement
description: This Datapack and Mod adds a new advancement for obtaining a Enchanted Golden Apple, translated into multiple languages (+20), compatible with version 1.20 to 26.1
body:
# Enchanted Golden Apple Advancement

**This DataPack and Mod** adds new advancement for obtaining a Enchanted Golden Apple, translated into multiple languages, compatible with version 1.20 to 26.1

![Enchanted Golden Apple Advancement](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c59a193000db56f35b53dbf49382a7f7f64a6bf8.png)
> **Advancement Labs © - 2026**

## Notas📝 (Notes)
- **Enchanted Golden Apple Advancement** is **compatible** with versions **1.20 to 26.1**🏷️
- **Enchanted Golden Apple Advancement** is compatible with any **functions and advancements Datapack in the World**
- **Enchanted Golden Apple Advancement** it has been translated into more than **20 Languages**
- **No** it is necessary to **unzip** the downloaded file 🗂️
